final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between a set of AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include each concept as a labeled node with definition snippets, connected by relationship lines/arrows showing how concepts relate to one another; layout should feel approachable and easy to scan
Subject: must include all 7 concepts as distinct visual nodes:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable and easy-to-understand atmosphere — exact tone is yours
Color palette: needs a light, readable direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketchbook surface treatment — exact paper texture and line weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept names exactly as written; relationship arrows/lines between related concepts must be visible; definitions and relationships must be legible
Avoid:
